author: claude
content: VDD R4 NOT CONVERGED — Mediocre. Gating flag correctly wired but wrong psycopg2 variant: kept psycopg2-binary (abandoned on conda-forge, stuck at 2.9.1, no Python 3.14 support), removed psycopg2 (actively maintained at 2.9.11). The pinned environment.yaml now has zero working psycopg2 driver. Fix: reverse — keep psycopg2, remove psycopg2-binary. Needs R5.
